technologies.description_en: IEEE 802.11 wireless local-area networking — Wi-Fi 4 through Wi-Fi 8 and beyond. Covers MAC/PHY innovations, multi-link operation, sensing, and AI-driven radio optimisation.
technologies.description_zh: IEEE 802.11 无线局域网 — 从 Wi-Fi 4 到 Wi-Fi 8 及以后。涵盖 MAC/PHY 创新、多链路操作、感知及 AI 驱动的射频优化。

technologies.description_en: 3GPP-defined cellular networks: LTE, 5G NR, and 6G vision. Covers RAN architecture, core network evolution, massive MIMO, network slicing, and AI-native features.
technologies.description_zh: 3GPP 定义的蜂窝网络：LTE、5G NR 及 6G 愿景。涵盖 RAN 架构、核心网演进、大规模 MIMO、网络切片及 AI 原生特性。

technologies.label_zh: 卫星通信 / 低轨卫星
technologies.description_en: Satellite communication networks: LEO constellations (Starlink, OneWeb), direct-to-device, NTN integration with cellular, and inter-satellite links.
technologies.description_zh: 卫星通信网络：低轨星座（Starlink、OneWeb）、卫星直连设备、NTN 与蜂窝的融合、星间链路。

technologies.description_en: Bluetooth Classic, BLE, LE Audio, and Bluetooth Mesh. Covers channel sounding, direction finding, and the Bluetooth SIG standardization pipeline.
technologies.description_zh: 经典蓝牙、BLE、LE Audio 及 Bluetooth Mesh。涵盖信道探测、方向查找及 Bluetooth SIG 标准化流程。

technologies.description_en: IEEE 802.15.4z UWB: precise ranging, FiRa Consortium application-layer protocols, radar sensing, and secure distance-bounding.
technologies.description_zh: IEEE 802.15.4z UWB：精密测距、FiRa 联盟应用层协议、雷达感知及安全距离界定。

technologies.description_en: NearLink (SparkLink): a short-range wireless protocol led by Huawei, combining SLB (SparkLink Basic — high-speed, low-latency access) and SLE (SparkLink Low Energy — power-efficient mode). Standardised by the SparkLink Alliance in China.
technologies.description_zh: 星闪（NearLink / SparkLink）：华为主导的短距无线协议，融合 SLB（基础接入 — 高速低时延）与 SLE（低功耗 — 高能效模式）。由中国的星闪联盟标准化。
